message:
Merge pull request #160 from tenzir/topic/preview-subdomain

Configure preview.docs.tenzir.com subdomain

files.patch:
@@ -73,8 +73,8 @@ jobs:
             # Skip link checking for PR previews - the validator doesn't handle
             # non-root base paths, and main branch builds catch broken links.
             bun run astro build \
-              --site "https://tenzir.github.io" \
-              --base "/docs-previews/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
+              --site "https://preview.docs.tenzir.com" \
+              --base "/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
           else
             CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true bun run astro build \
               --site "${{ steps.pages.outputs.origin }}" \
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
         with:
           script: |
-            const url = 'https://tenzir.github.io/docs-previews/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}';
+            const url = 'https://preview.docs.tenzir.com/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}';
             const comment = [
               '<!-- docs-preview -->',
               `📦 **Preview**  ·  [View →](${url})  ·  🟢 Live`,

@@ -43,6 +43,8 @@ jobs:
           # Orphan branch to reset history
           git checkout --orphan fresh
           git add -A
+          echo "preview.docs.tenzir.com" > CNAME
+          git add CNAME
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
           git commit -m "Compact: keep only open PR previews" || echo "Nothing to commit"
